programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The children prepare their kites and get ready for the kite flying competition. Meanwhile, Pari Ghudi is planning on abducting the children while they are at it. Can Baalveer stop her?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As Montu cheats in the kite competition and cuts Meher's kite, Pari Ghudi lurks in the sky in search of children she can deceive and kidnap. Can Baalveer stop her?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: A wounded bird informs Baalveer that it has been hurt by a kite that held a female prisoner. In the meantime, Patanga Pari lures Montu and his companion into a trap by offering them a kite.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Pari Ghudi abducts Manav in broad daylight and Baalveer tries to stop her. However, Baalveer's powers fail before her and he falls to the ground. Will he be able to find another way to stop her?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Pari Patanga abducts the kids and takes them to a mysterious land. In order to know her location, Baalveer masquerades as Ballu and follows Patanga's trail.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Montu plans to fool the teachers in order to score well in the exams. Meanwhile, Bhayankar Pari makes a plan to trouble the kids.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham society gather at the soda shop together, only to find that one of them has gone missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham set out on a mission to find some fresh lemons. However, when they fail to do so, Abdul suggests that they should try and pluck some lemons from a tree.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal wishes to accompany Bhide and his wife to the wedding they are about to attend in the hopes of finding himself a bride.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The strike of taxis and auto-rickshaws proves to be a cause of worry about the members of the society. Later, Sodhi comes up with a quick solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Due to the strike of taxis and auto-rickshaws, Champaklal is unable to travel. Later, seeing Champaklal in a troubled state, Tappu decides to learn to drive.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tappu, desperate to learn to ride a scooter, makes a duplicate of Bhide's scooter keys and practices on it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu convinces his friends to lie to their parents about going for a cricket tournament in order to ride the scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide obsesses over his new scooter and keeps cleaning it; Tapu calls Baga and asks him to help him sneak the scooter out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone teases Bhide about his obsession with his scooter. Later, Bhide calls Tapu Sena home and questions them about their holidays.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide notices that there is dirt on his scooter's tyres. He is sure that someone has driven around the city on his scooter. When Bhide names Tappu as his suspect, Jethalal gets furious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to stay up all night while Gogi and Goli decide to give up on riding but Tapu advises them to continue their practice. He tells them that they will be extra careful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide drinks a packet of tea to stay awake during the night as he hopes to catch the culprits. Meanwhile, Tappu, Goli and Gogi plan to make Bhide fall asleep.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham society are busy making preparations for celebrating the festival of Makar Sankranti.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide's uncle gives him one lakh rupees. He is clueless as he doesn't know where to spend it. He asks the people from his society for advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal finds Champaklal in a strange state, he checks up on him. Later, Champaklal goes to Bhide for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide obsesses over his new scooter and keeps cleaning it; Tapu calls Baga and asks him to help him sneak the scooter out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone teases Bhide about his obsession with his scooter. Later, Bhide calls Tapu Sena home and questions them about their holidays.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide notices that there is dirt on his scooter's tyres. He is sure that someone has driven around the city on his scooter. When Bhide names Tappu as his suspect, Jethalal gets furious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide decides to stay up all night while Gogi and Goli decide to give up on riding but Tapu advises them to continue their practice. He tells them that they will be extra careful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide drinks a packet of tea to stay awake during the night as he hopes to catch the culprits. Meanwhile, Tappu, Goli and Gogi plan to make Bhide fall asleep.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham society are busy making preparations for celebrating the festival of Makar Sankranti.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide's uncle gives him one lakh rupees. He is clueless as he doesn't know where to spend it. He asks the people from his society for advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide's uncle gives him one lakh rupees. He is clueless as he doesn't know where to spend it. He asks the people from his society for advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As a prank, Jethalal pretends to be a thug when he calls Bhide. Later, he advises Bhide about where to invest his money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal finds Champaklal in a strange state, he checks up on him. Later, Champaklal goes to Bhide for help.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal asks Bhide for money but does not explain the reason behind it which puts Bhide into a serious dilemma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is still confused about Champaklal's request and tries to avoid him. Later, Bhide makes excuses in front of Champaklal.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda is in a surreal mood when she feeds her son for the first time. However, Lord Vishnu decides to intervene and stop Yashoda from finding the truth.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali gives Taarak the idea to write an article on the water problem in the country. While playing, the kids waste a lot of water, and Bhide gets angry with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide informs the ladies about the possible water shortage in the city. Jethalal is forced to use cold water from the refrigerator to take a bath.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhvi is about to throw Bhide's tape recorder out of the house, he intervenes. Bhide goes on to explain the importance of the tape recorder in his life.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tasks Bagha with the responsibility of fixing Bhide's tape recorder, but things take an unexpected turn as Bagha drops the tape recorder on the floor and damages it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is furious to see Iyer badmouthing him in front of the whole society and lashes out at Iyer for his actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is left fuming as his tape recorder does not function despite being repaired. He questions Jethalal about the matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal manages to replace the tape recorder, the residents of Gokuldham come together to let their hair down with song and dance.

programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham continue to dance to melodies from the years gone by. They reminisce about singers and songwriters from the past.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides that he will not take money from Bhide for repairing his damaged tape recorder, but he accidentally mentions the cost during the process.
